name: Cioppino
recipeIngredient: 1 pound sea bass, cut into chunks
1 small green pepper, seeded and chopped
6 oz frozen crabmeat, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine half of the sea bass in a Crock-Pot with vegetables, garlic, tomato sauce, beef broth, and seasonings. Stir well.
2. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours or on High for 2 to 4 hours.
3. One hour before serving, turn to High and stir in the remaining sea bass and seafood. Cover and cook on High for 1 hour or until done.
4. Garnish with minced parsley and serve in soup plates. Accompany with hot Italian bread.
5. Serves 6
